entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `question` TEXT NOT NULL, `answer` TEXT, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `prompt_id` INTEGER, `source_url` TEXT, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `parent_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `child_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `relation_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`parent_id`) REFERENCES `question_items`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`child_id`) REFERENCES `question_items`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_question_links_parent_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_question_links_parent_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`parent_id`)

indices.name: index_question_links_child_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_question_links_child_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`child_id`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `system_prompt` TEXT NOT NULL, `is_default` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`question` TEXT NOT NULL, `answer` TEXT, tokenize=unicode61, content=`question_items`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_question_items_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `question_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `question_items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_question_items_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `question_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `question_items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_question_items_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `question_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `question_items_fts`(`docid`, `question`, `answer`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`question`, NEW.`answer`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_question_items_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `question_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `question_items_fts`(`docid`, `question`, `answer`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`question`, NEW.`answer`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
